methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired structure.

goals.title: 2026-Q1 Make parking operations feel like one controlled system
goals.objective: Reduce parking-operator friction by converging pricing, payment, access, and enforcement workflows into a clearer control-tower model.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of parked vehicles converted into valid paid sessions or permits.
Time needed to process and close parking violations or permit disputes.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Recurring software and services revenue from parking operator accounts.

keyResults.target: Turn more parking events into valid, policy-compliant sessions
keyResults.baseline: Conversion is hurt by fragmented channel and access behaviors
keyResults.statement: Increase paid session conversion rate by making tariffs, payments, permits, and access behave consistently across the parking estate.

keyResults.baseline: Resolution slows down when evidence and workflow states are fragmented
keyResults.statement: Reduce violation resolution cycle time by standardizing compliance workflows and evidence handling.

keyResults.target: Strengthen expansion and retention inside parking accounts
keyResults.baseline: ARR growth depends on making the platform feel more operationally coherent
keyResults.statement: Increase parking platform ARR by improving the operational-control story for parking operators.

linkedInitiatives.description: Parking control tower convergence initiative focused on improving parking configuration & policy management, payment channel orchestration, access, permit & LPR control, enforcement & compliance workflows, and operator analytics & control tower across Operator Control Console, Parking KPI Cockpit, and Parking Operations API.

linkedReleases.description: Release of parking control tower updates covering parking configuration & policy management, payment channel orchestration, access, permit & LPR control, and enforcement & compliance workflows across Operator Control Console, Parking KPI Cockpit, and Parking Operations API.

goals.title: 2026-Q1 Make transit open payment dependable enough to scale
goals.objective: Reduce rollout risk in open-payment transport programs by improving device-state visibility, tap reliability, and financial exception handling.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of payment taps completed without error or fallback.
Share of journeys successfully charged under the intended fare rules.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Transaction volume processed through transit payment services.

keyResults.target: Make tap-and-go work reliably during live transport operations
keyResults.baseline: Success drops when device state and exception flows are not visible enough
keyResults.statement: Increase tap success rate by strengthening device-state control, payment retry behavior, and monitoring.

keyResults.target: Reduce revenue leakage in open-payment operations
keyResults.baseline: Leakage is driven by payment exceptions and weak reconciliation transparency
keyResults.statement: Increase fare capture rate by tightening exception handling and settlement visibility.

keyResults.target: Create the confidence needed for broader rollout and usage
keyResults.baseline: Volume growth depends on making transport operators trust the platform in production
keyResults.statement: Increase processed payment volume by making transport payment operations reliable enough for wider deployment.

linkedInitiatives.description: Transit open-payment reliability initiative focused on improving transit fare & open payment engine, device & validator management, transit operations telemetry, and settlement, ledger & revenue reconciliation across Transit Operations Console, Validator and Driver Device Estate, and Transit Revenue Board.

linkedReleases.description: Release of transit open-payment reliability improvements covering transit fare & open payment engine, device & validator management, transit operations telemetry, and settlement, ledger & revenue reconciliation across Transit Operations Console, Validator and Driver Device Estate, and Transit Revenue Board.

goals.title: 2026-Q1 Make the partner ecosystem easier to launch and trust
goals.objective: Reduce ecosystem friction by standardizing partner launch, clarifying market rules, and improving post-launch performance visibility.

linkedCustomerKPIs.kpiName: Time to launch a new market
linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Elapsed time from decision to launch-ready market activation.
Share of partner-originated transactions completed without operational or financial failure.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Gross profit generated through partner-originated transactions and attach services.

keyResults.metric: Time to launch a new market
keyResults.target: Shorten onboarding and certification for ecosystem launches
keyResults.baseline: Launch time is slowed by rule ambiguity and service-led setup
keyResults.statement: Reduce time to launch a new market by turning partner onboarding into a reusable product workflow.

keyResults.target: Make partner-originated mobility transactions more dependable
keyResults.baseline: Success degrades when rules, diagnostics, and settlement visibility are inconsistent
keyResults.statement: Increase transaction success rate by making certification, rules, and post-launch reporting clearer.

keyResults.target: Improve the economics of partner-led growth
keyResults.baseline: Profitability depends on partner scale, attach, and low launch overhead
keyResults.statement: Increase ecosystem gross profit by accelerating launch speed while improving attach and transaction quality.

linkedInitiatives.description: Partner expansion foundation initiative focused on improving partner API, sandbox & certification, market catalog & operator rules, partner analytics & revenue reporting, automotive & in-car data services, and API gateway & developer experience across Partner APIs and SDKs, Partner Workspace, and Partner Performance Board.

linkedReleases.description: Release of partner launch and automotive-integration improvements covering partner API, sandbox & certification, market catalog & operator rules, partner analytics & revenue reporting, and automotive & in-car data services across Partner APIs and SDKs, Partner Workspace, and Partner Performance Board.
